---
title: "v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

DiT Flow Matching candidate with condition dropout and re-coarsening consistency.
It combines the v8 DiT backbone with the strongest fine-tuning ideas from the v4 family.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | pixel-space DiT |
| Objective | Flow Matching on `HR - mu` |
| Condition dropout | 0.15 |
| Re-coarsening weight | 0.05 |
| Patch size | 128 |
| Embed dim | 384 |
| Heads | 12 |
| Motivation | test whether DiT benefits from CFG-ready training and LR consistency |
| Research inspiration | DiT, classifier-free guidance, re-coarsening consistency |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v9c_dit_cfg_recoarsen.csv`
